>>> text/hp_pp_window/separate_decimal_digits.asm
  C20BD0:             SEPARATE_DECIMAL_DIGITS:
  C20BD0: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION
  C20BD2:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C20BD2:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C20BD2:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int
  C20BD2: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          F0 FF 5B 68 
  C20BDA: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C20BDC: A2 A6 8C        LDX #.LOWORD(HPPP_WINDOW_DIGIT_BUFFER) + 2
  C20BDF:                 ; Get 1s digit
  C20BDF: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20BE2: 22 13 92 C0     JSL MODULUS16
  C20BE6: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20BE8: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C20BEB:                 ; Get 10s digit
  C20BEB: CA              DEX
  C20BEC: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20BEF: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20BF1: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C20BF3: 22 3D 91 C0     JSL DIVISION16S_DIVISOR_POSITIVE
  C20BF7: 85 0E           STA @LOCAL00
  C20BF9: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20BFC: 22 13 92 C0     JSL MODULUS16
  C20C00: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20C02: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C20C05: CA              DEX
  C20C06:                 ; Get 100s digit
  C20C06: A0 0A 00        LDY #10
  C20C09: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C20C0B: A5 0E           LDA @LOCAL00
  C20C0D: 22 3D 91 C0     JSL DIVISION16S_DIVISOR_POSITIVE
  C20C11: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8

  C22694:             LEARN_SPECIAL_PSI:

  C22696: C9 01 00        CMP #$0001
  C22699: F0 11           BEQ @LEARN_TELEPORT_ALPHA
  C2269B: C9 02 00        CMP #$0002
  C2269E: F0 1B           BEQ @LEARN_TELEPORT_BETA
  C226A0: C9 03 00        CMP #$0003
  C226A3: F0 25           BEQ @LEARN_STARSTORM_ALPHA
  C226A5: C9 04 00        CMP #$0004
  C226A8: F0 2F           BEQ @LEARN_STARSTORM_OMEGA
  C226AA: 80 3A           BRA @RETURN

  C226B4: 09 01           ORA #PARTY_PSI_FLAGS::TELEPORT_ALPHA
  C226B6: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C226B9: 80 2B           BRA @RETURN
  C226BB:             @LEARN_TELEPORT_BETA:
  C226BB: A2 EA 9A        LDX #.LOWORD(GAME_STATE) + game_state::party_psi
  C226BE: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8

  C226CA:             @LEARN_STARSTORM_ALPHA:

>>> misc/atm_deposit.asm
  C226E9:             DEPOSIT_INTO_ATM:
  C226E9: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION_FAR
  C226EB:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C226EB:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT32
  C226EB:                 STACK_RESERVE_RETURN_INT32 ;long
  C226EB:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT32 ;long amount
  C226EB: 0B 7B 69 EE     END_STACK_VARS
          FF 5B       
  C226F1: A5 20 85 06     MOVE_INT @PARAM00, @VIRTUAL06
          A5 22 85 08 
  C226F9: A5 06 85 0E     MOVE_INT @VIRTUAL06, @LOCAL00
          A5 08 85 10

>>> misc/battlebgs/generate_frame.asm
  C2C8E7:             ; Generate a single frame of HDMA data for animated backgrounds
  C2C8E7:             GENERATE_BATTLEBG_FRAME:
  C2C8E7: C2 31           BEGIN_C_FUNCTION_FAR
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_VARS
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT8
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_INT16
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;NEAR loaded_bg_data* bgState
  C2C8E9:                 STACK_RESERVE_PARAM_INT16 ;int layer
  C2C8E9: 0B 48 7B 69     END_STACK_VARS
          E1 FF 5B 68 
  C2C8F1: 86 1D           STX @LOCAL08
  C2C8F3: 85 1B           STA @LOCAL07
  C2C8F5: B2 1B           LDA (@LOCAL07)
  C2C8F7: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C2C8FA: 85 19           STA @LOCAL06
  C2C8FC: A0 02 00        LDY #loaded_bg_data::freeze_palette_scrolling
  C2C8FF: B1 1B           LDA (@LOCAL07),Y
  C2C901: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C2C904: F0 03 4C 40     BNEL @TARGET_BG_LAYER_SELECTION_COMPLETE
          CD          
  C2C909: A5 1B           LDA @LOCAL07
  C2C90B: 18              CLC
  C2C90C: 69 0B 00        ADC #loaded_bg_data::palette_change_duration_left
  C2C90F: AA              TAX
  C2C910: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C2C912: BD 00 00        LDA __BSS_START__,X
  C2C915: 85 18           STA @LOCAL05
  C2C917: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C2C919: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C2C91C: D0 03 4C 68     BEQL @UNKNOWN23
          CB          
  C2C921: E2 20           SEP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C2C923: A5 18           LDA @LOCAL05
  C2C925: 3A              DEC
  C2C926: 9D 00 00        STA __BSS_START__,X
  C2C929: C2 20           REP #PROC_FLAGS::ACCUM8
  C2C92B: 29 FF 00        AND #$00FF
  C2C92E: F0 03 4C 68     BNEL @UNKNOWN23
          CB          
  C2C933: A0 0A 00        LDY #loaded_bg_data::palette_change_speed
